I hope you're ready for another scenario. In this example, you have a meeting with a potential client. You have to get a second meeting with the decision makers so you can give them a full demo to show the value of your product. Let's imagine you're selling software that is guaranteed to help an organization increase their productivity. Your product is considered the best in the industry, but is also one of the most expensive. The other issue is that there are hundreds of other programs in your market space that all work somewhat similarly to yours. You say, hello Mr. Smith, it's nice to meet you. I'm, say your first name, from ABC Technologies. All right, what do you say next?
